title: ITW Schedules First Quarter 2022 Earnings Webcast
text: GLENVIEW, Ill., April 12, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE: ITW) will issue its first quarter 2022 results on Tuesday, May 3, 2022 at 7:00 a.m. CDT. Following the release, ITW will hold its first quarter earnings webcast at 9:00 a.m. CDT.
